sentences.sentence: A little over a century ago, men of the ilk of Scott, Shackleton and Mawson battled against Antarctica's blizzards, cold and deprivation.
sentences.translation: 一个多世纪以前，像斯科特、沙克尔顿和莫森那样的人曾与南极洲的暴风雪、严寒和物资匮乏奋力抗争。

structure.text: A little over a century ago
men of the ilk of Scott, Shackleton and Mawson

difficult_points: of the ilk of 表示“与……同一类的”，这里指具有这些探险家气质的人。
battled against 的宾语并列三项，其中 deprivation 指物资和基本条件的匮乏。

expressions.text: a little over a century ago

sentences.sentence: In the name of Empire and in an age of heroic deeds they created an image of Antarctica that was to last well into the 20th century— an image of remoteness, hardship, bleakness and isolation that was the province of only the most courageous of men.
sentences.translation: 他们以帝国之名，在一个崇尚英雄壮举的时代塑造了南极洲的形象；这一形象一直延续到20世纪很长一段时期——一个遥远、艰苦、荒凉而孤绝，只有最勇敢者才有资格涉足的地方。

structure.text: In the name of Empire and in an age of heroic deeds
that was to last well into the 20th century
an image of remoteness, hardship, bleakness and isolation that was the province of only the most courageous of men

difficult_points: 第一个 that 修饰 image，was to last 表示这一形象后来注定长期延续。
破折号后的 an image 是同位语，重新具体描述南极形象；其后 that 从句修饰该形象。
be the province of 并非行政区含义，而是比喻某事只属于或只适合某类人。

expressions.meaning_zh: 一直延续到……很长一段时间

sentences.sentence: The image was one of a place removed from everyday reality, of a place with no apparent value to anyone.
sentences.translation: 这种形象所呈现的是一个远离日常现实、似乎对任何人都毫无价值的地方。

structure.text: one of a place removed from everyday reality
of a place with no apparent value to anyone

difficult_points: one 代替前文 image，one of a place 可理解为“一个关于某地的形象”。
removed from... 是过去分词短语修饰 place；两个 of a place 短语并列描绘南极。

sentences.sentence: As we enter the 21st century, our perception of Antarctica has changed.
sentences.translation: 随着我们进入21世纪，人们对南极洲的认识已经发生变化。
difficult_points: As 引导时间从句，强调认知变化与进入新世纪同步。
perception of Antarctica 指对南极的理解和看法，不仅是视觉感知。

sentences.sentence: Although physically Antarctica is no closer and probably no warmer, and to spend time there still demands a dedication not seen in ordinary life, the continent and its surrounding ocean are increasingly seen to be an integral part of Planet Earth, and a key component in the Earth System.
sentences.translation: 尽管从地理上说南极洲并未变得更近，气候大概也没有变暖，而且在那里生活仍需要日常生活中罕见的投入与坚守，但人们越来越认识到，这片大陆及其周围海洋是地球不可分割的一部分，也是地球系统中的关键组成部分。

structure.text: Although physically Antarctica is no closer and probably no warmer
and to spend time there still demands a dedication not seen in ordinary life
the continent and its surrounding ocean
an integral part of Planet Earth, and a key component in the Earth System

difficult_points: Although 管辖两个由 and 连接的让步内容，第二部分以不定式 to spend time there 作主语。
not seen in ordinary life 是过去分词短语修饰 dedication。
are seen to be 是被动认知结构，后接两个并列表语 an integral part 与 a key component。

sentences.sentence: Is this because the world seems a little smaller these days, shrunk by TV and tourism, or is it because Antarctica really does occupy a central spot on Earth's mantle?
sentences.translation: 这是因为如今电视和旅游让世界显得小了一些，还是因为南极洲确实在地球表层占据着核心位置？

structure.text: Is this because the world seems a little smaller these days
or is it because Antarctica really does occupy a central spot on Earth's mantle

difficult_points: 这是由 or 连接的选择疑问句，两部分都采用系动词前置。
shrunk by... 是过去分词补充说明世界显小的原因。
does occupy 中 does 用于强调，突出南极确实具有核心地位。

expressions.meaning_zh: 因电视和旅游而显得缩小

sentences.sentence: Scientific research during the past half century has revealed— and continues to reveal—that Antarctica's great mass and low temperature exert a major influence on climate and ocean circulation, factors which influence the lives of millions of people all over the globe.
sentences.translation: 过去半个世纪的科学研究已经揭示——并仍在不断揭示——南极洲巨大的体量和低温对气候及海洋环流具有重大影响，而这些因素又影响着全球数百万人的生活。

structure.text: Scientific research during the past half century
has revealed— and continues to reveal—
that Antarctica's great mass and low temperature exert a major influence on climate and ocean circulation
which influence the lives of millions of people all over the globe

difficult_points: has revealed 与 continues to reveal 作为插入式并列谓语，共同引出 that 宾语从句。
factors 是 climate and ocean circulation 的同位概括，which 从句再说明它们对人类生活的影响。
源文破折号两侧空格不统一，sentence 中已原样保留。

sentences.sentence: Antarctica was not always cold.
sentences.translation: 南极洲并非一直如此寒冷。
difficult_points: not always 是部分否定，表示并非所有时期都寒冷。
cold 是主语补语，描述南极洲过去的气候状态。

sentences.sentence: The slow break-up of the super-continent Gondwana with the northward movements of Africa, South America, India and Australia eventually created enough space around Antarctica for the development of an Antarctic Circumpolar Current(ACC), that flowed from west to east under the influence of the prevailing westerly winds.
sentences.translation: 冈瓦纳超级大陆缓慢分裂，加上非洲、南美洲、印度和澳大利亚向北移动，最终在南极洲周围形成了足够空间，使南极绕极流（ACC）得以发展；该洋流在盛行西风影响下自西向东流动。

structure.text: The slow break-up of the super-continent Gondwana with the northward movements of Africa, South America, India and Australia
for the development of an Antarctic Circumpolar Current(ACC)
that flowed from west to east under the influence of the prevailing westerly winds

difficult_points: 长主语中心词是 break-up，with 后短语补充同时发生的各大陆北移。
enough space for... 表示空间足以让绕极流形成。
that 修饰 ACC，under the influence of 说明洋流方向受盛行西风控制；原文 Current 与括号间无空格。

sentences.sentence: Antarctica cooled, its vegetation perished, glaciation began and the continent took on its present-day appearance.
sentences.translation: 南极洲逐渐变冷，植被消亡，冰川作用开始，这片大陆也呈现出如今的面貌。

structure.text: and the continent took on its present-day appearance

difficult_points: 四个独立分句连续并列，概括南极环境演变的因果过程。
take on 在此表示逐渐呈现某种外观，而非承担任务。

sentences.sentence: Today the ice that overlies the bedrock is up to 4km thick, and surface temperatures as low as -89.2deg C have been recorded.
sentences.translation: 如今，覆盖基岩的冰层厚达4公里，地表还曾记录到低至零下89.2摄氏度的气温。

structure.text: and surface temperatures as low as -89.2deg C have been recorded

difficult_points: that 定语从句修饰 ice，overlie 表示覆盖在基岩之上。
as low as... 修饰 temperatures，have been recorded 是现在完成时被动语态。
4km 和 -89.2deg C 是源文原始单位写法，未作格式修正。

sentences.sentence: The icy blast that howls over the ice cap and out to sea—the so-called katabatic wind—can reach 300 km/hr, creating fearsome wind-chill effects,
sentences.translation: 呼啸着越过冰盖、吹向海面的冰冷强风——即所谓的下降风——风速可达每小时300公里，造成可怕的风寒效应，

structure.text: that howls over the ice cap and out to sea

difficult_points: that 从句修饰 icy blast，over the ice cap 与 out to sea 描写风的路径。
破折号中的 the so-called katabatic wind 是同位语，给这种风命名。
creating... 表示高速风带来的结果；源句末为逗号而非句号，已原样保留。

sentences.sentence: Out of this extreme environment come some powerful forces that reverberate around the world.
sentences.translation: 一些影响波及全球的强大力量正从这种极端环境中产生。
difficult_points: 地点状语 Out of... 前置导致完全倒装，真正主语是 some powerful forces。
that 修饰 forces；reverberate 原指回响，此处比喻影响扩散至全球。

sentences.sentence: The Earth's rotation, coupled to the generation of cells of low pressure off the Antarctic coast, would allow Astronauts a view of Antarctica that is as beautiful as it is awesome.
sentences.translation: 地球自转与南极海岸外低压气旋的形成相结合，会让宇航员看到一幅既壮美又令人敬畏的南极景象。

structure.text: coupled to the generation of cells of low pressure off the Antarctic coast
that is as beautiful as it is awesome

difficult_points: coupled to... 是过去分词短语，补充地球自转与低压系统生成的共同作用。
allow Astronauts a view 是双宾语结构；原文 Astronauts 大写已保留。
that 修饰 view；as beautiful as it is awesome 表示美丽程度与震撼程度同样突出。

expressions.text: as beautiful as it is awesome

sentences.sentence: Spinning away to the northeast, the cells grow and deepen, whipping up the Southern Ocean into the mountainous seas so respected by mariners.
sentences.translation: 这些低压气旋向东北旋转远去，同时不断扩大加深，把南大洋搅动成令航海者敬畏的山峰般巨浪。

structure.text: whipping up the Southern Ocean into the mountainous seas

difficult_points: Spinning... 的逻辑主语是 the cells，即上一句低压气旋，而非普通细胞。
whipping up... 是现在分词结果状语，说明气旋把海面搅成巨浪。
so respected by mariners 修饰 seas，respected 在此含“因危险而敬畏”之意。

sentences.sentence: Recent work is showing that the temperature of the ocean may be a better predictor of rainfall in Australia than is the pressure difference between Darwin and Tahiti—the Southern Oscillation Index.
sentences.translation: 近期研究显示，与达尔文和塔希提之间的气压差——即南方涛动指数——相比，海洋温度或许能更准确地预测澳大利亚降雨。

structure.text: that the temperature of the ocean may be a better predictor of rainfall in Australia
than is the pressure difference between Darwin and Tahiti

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，a better predictor than... 构成比较。
than 从句采用倒装语序 than is the pressure difference，以平衡较长主语。
破折号后的 Southern Oscillation Index 是 pressure difference 的同位语。

sentences.sentence: By receiving more accurate predictions, graziers in northern Queensland are able to avoid overstocking in years when rainfall will be poor.
sentences.translation: 借助更准确的预测，昆士兰北部的牧场主能够在降雨偏少的年份避免放养过量牲畜。
difficult_points: By doing 表示实现结果的手段；graziers 指经营放牧的牧场主。
avoid 后接动名词 overstocking；when 修饰 years，表示降雨不足的年份。

sentences.sentence: Not only does this limit their losses but it prevents serious pasture degradation that may take decades to repair.
sentences.translation: 这不仅能限制他们的损失，还能防止可能需要数十年才能修复的严重牧场退化。

structure.text: Not only does this limit their losses
but it prevents serious pasture degradation
that may take decades to repair

difficult_points: Not only 置于句首触发部分倒装，助动词 does 提到主语 this 前。
but 后不倒装；this 与 it 都回指避免过度放牧这一做法。
that 修饰 pasture degradation；take decades to repair 表示修复耗时数十年。

sentences.sentence: CSIRO is developing this as a prototype forecasting system, but we can confidently predict that as we know more about the Antarctic and Southern Ocean we will be able to enhance and extend our predictive ability.
sentences.translation: 澳大利亚联邦科学与工业研究组织正把这一方法开发为预测系统原型；我们也可以有把握地预见，随着对南极和南大洋了解加深，人类将能够增强并拓展预测能力。

structure.text: is developing this as a prototype forecasting system
that as we know more about the Antarctic and Southern Ocean
as we know more about the Antarctic and Southern Ocean
we will be able to enhance and extend our predictive ability

difficult_points: develop A as B 表示把某方法开发成系统原型；this 指前述海温预测方法。
predict 后的 that 宾语从句中又含 as 从句，表示随着知识增加。
enhance 与 extend 并列：既提高预测水平，也扩大预测范围。

sentences.sentence: The ocean's surface temperature results from the interplay between deep-water temperature, air temperature and ice.
sentences.translation: 海洋表面温度是深层水温、气温和海冰相互作用的结果。

structure.text: the interplay between deep-water temperature, air temperature and ice

difficult_points: result from 表示由某些因素造成，与 result in 的“导致”方向相反。
interplay between... 强调三项因素彼此作用，而非简单相加。

sentences.sentence: Each winter between 4 and 19 million square km of sea ice form, locking up huge quantities of heat close to the continent.
sentences.translation: 每年冬季会形成400万至1900万平方公里的海冰，将大量热量封存在大陆附近。

structure.text: between 4 and 19 million square km of sea ice
locking up huge quantities of heat close to the continent

difficult_points: between 4 and 19 million square km 是海冰面积范围，中心主语为 sea ice。
locking up... 是现在分词结果状语，说明海冰形成对热量的影响。

sentences.sentence: Only now can we start to unravel the influ-ence of sea ice on the weather that is experienced in southern Australia.
sentences.translation: 直到现在，我们才开始揭示海冰对澳大利亚南部天气的影响。

structure.text: to unravel the influ-ence of sea ice on the weather
that is experienced in southern Australia

difficult_points: Only now 位于句首触发部分倒装，can 提到主语 we 前。
that 修饰 weather；is experienced 是被动表达，指当地经历的天气。
源文把 influence 异常断为 influ-ence，sentence 中已原样保留。

sentences.sentence: But in another way the extent of sea ice extends its influence far beyond Antarctica.
sentences.translation: 但从另一个方面看，海冰覆盖范围所产生的影响远远超出了南极洲。
difficult_points: extent 作主语表示海冰覆盖的范围；extends 与 extent 词形相近但功能不同。
its 回指 the extent of sea ice，far beyond 强调影响超出南极很远。

expressions.meaning_zh: 把影响远远扩展到……之外

sentences.sentence: Antarctic krill—the small shrimp-like crustaceans that are the staple diet for baleen whales, penguins, some seals, flighted sea birds and many fish—breed well in years when sea ice is extensive and poorly when it is not.
sentences.translation: 南极磷虾——这种小型、形似虾的甲壳动物是须鲸、企鹅、部分海豹、会飞的海鸟和许多鱼类的主食——在海冰范围广的年份繁殖良好，而在海冰不广的年份繁殖不佳。

structure.text: that are the staple diet for baleen whales, penguins, some seals, flighted sea birds and many fish
and poorly when it is not

difficult_points: 破折号中的名词短语同位解释 krill，that 从句说明其在食物链中的作用。
第一个 when 修饰 years；and poorly 后省略 breed，形成正反条件对照。
末尾 it 指 sea ice，is not 后省略 extensive。

sentences.sentence: Many species of baleen whales and flighted sea birds migrate between the hemispheres and when the krill are less abundant they do not thrive.
sentences.translation: 许多种须鲸和会飞的海鸟会在南北半球之间迁徙；当磷虾数量减少时，它们便无法繁盛。

structure.text: Many species of baleen whales and flighted sea birds
and when the krill are less abundant

difficult_points: and 连接迁徙事实与磷虾减少带来的生存结果。
when 从句说明无法繁盛的条件；they 指鲸类和海鸟，不是 krill。

sentences.sentence: The circulatory system of the world's oceans is like a huge conveyor belt, moving water and dis-solved minerals and nutrients from one hemisphere to the other, and from the ocean's abyssal depths to the surface.
sentences.translation: 世界海洋的环流系统如同一条巨大的传送带，把海水以及溶解其中的矿物质和营养物从一个半球运往另一个半球，并从海洋深渊输送到表层。

structure.text: The circulatory system of the world's oceans
is like a huge conveyor belt
moving water and dis-solved minerals and nutrients from one hemisphere to the other
and from the ocean's abyssal depths to the surface

difficult_points: a huge conveyor belt 是比喻，说明全球海洋环流持续输送物质。
moving... 是现在分词补充说明传送带的功能，两个 from... to... 并列表示水平与垂直运输。
源文 dissolved 异常断为 dis-solved，已原样保留。

expressions.text: from one hemisphere to the other
expressions.meaning_zh: 从一个半球到另一个半球

sentences.sentence: The ACC is the longest current in the world, and has the largest flow.
sentences.translation: 南极绕极流是世界上最长的洋流，也是流量最大的洋流。

structure.text: is the longest current in the world

difficult_points: is 与 has 共用主语 The ACC，分别说明长度和流量两个最高级特征。
the largest flow 中 flow 指洋流输送的水量，而非流动动作本身。

expressions.text: the longest current in the world

sentences.sentence: Through it, the deep flows of the Atlantic, Indian and Pacific Oceans are joined to form part of a single global thermohaline circulation,
sentences.translation: 通过南极绕极流，大西洋、印度洋和太平洋的深层水流汇合起来，成为统一的全球温盐环流的一部分，

structure.text: the deep flows of the Atlantic, Indian and Pacific Oceans
to form part of a single global thermohaline circulation

difficult_points: it 回指 ACC；Through it 表示三大洋深层水流借助这一洋流相连。
are joined 是被动语态，to form... 表示汇合后形成的结果。
源句末为逗号而非句号，sentence 中保留了这一异常。

expressions.text: be joined to form part of

sentences.sentence: During winter, the howling katabatics sometimes scour the ice off patches of the sea's surface leaving large ice-locked lagoons, or'polynyas'.
sentences.translation: 冬季，呼啸的下降风有时会刮走部分海面的冰层，留下被海冰环绕的大型潟湖，即“冰间湖”。

structure.text: sometimes scour the ice off patches of the sea's surface

difficult_points: scour A off B 表示强风把冰从部分海面刮除。
leaving... 是现在分词结果状语；or 后的 polynyas 给这些冰封潟湖提供专名。
源文 or 与引号之间没有空格，已原样保留。

sentences.sentence: Recent research has shown that as fresh sea ice forms, it is continuously stripped away by the wind and may be blown up to 90km in a single day.
sentences.translation: 近期研究表明，新海冰形成时会不断被风剥离，一天之内可能被吹走多达90公里。

structure.text: that as fresh sea ice forms
it is continuously stripped away by the wind
and may be blown up to 90km in a single day

difficult_points: shown 后的 that 宾语从句内部含 as 时间从句，描述海冰刚形成时。
it 指 fresh sea ice；is stripped 与 may be blown 是并列被动谓语。
up to 90km 表示被风带走的最大距离，而不是速度。

expressions.text: be stripped away by the wind

sentences.sentence: Since only fresh water freezes into ice, the water that remains becomes increasingly salty and dense, sinking until it spills over the continental shelf.
sentences.translation: 由于只有淡水会冻结成冰，剩余海水会变得越来越咸、密度越来越大，并不断下沉，直至越过大陆架。

structure.text: Since only fresh water freezes into ice
sinking until it spills over the continental shelf

difficult_points: Since 引导原因从句，解释结冰后剩余海水盐度和密度升高。
that remains 修饰 water；sinking 是结果状语，逻辑主语仍是 the water。
until 中 it 回指剩余海水，spills over 表示越过大陆架边缘。

expressions.meaning_zh: 变得越来越咸且密度更大

sentences.sentence: Cold water carries more oxygen than warm water, so when it rises, well into the northern hemi-sphere, it reoxygenates and revitalises the ocean.
sentences.translation: 冷水比暖水携带更多氧气，因此当它一路上升、深入北半球时，会为海洋重新补充氧气并恢复其活力。

structure.text: Cold water carries more oxygen than warm water
so when it rises, well into the northern hemi-sphere
it reoxygenates and revitalises the ocean

difficult_points: more... than... 比较冷水和暖水的含氧能力；so 引出这一差异的结果。
when it rises 中 it 指 cold water，well into... 表示深入北半球。
reoxygenates 与 revitalises 是并列谓语；源文 hemisphere 异常断为 hemi-sphere。

sentences.sentence: The state of the northern oceans, and their biological productivity, owe much to what happens in the Antarctic.
sentences.translation: 北方海洋的状况及其生物生产力，很大程度上归因于南极所发生的一切。

structure.text: The state of the northern oceans, and their biological productivity

difficult_points: 主语由 state 与 biological productivity 并列，所以谓语使用 owe。
what 引导融合关系从句，既包含“发生的事情”这一先行含义，又在从句中作主语。

expressions.meaning_zh: 很大程度上归功于或取决于……
